evidence: Unfortunately, the identification step alone increases the sampling complexity by O( N) per hash function, so unlike~ IK14a , here we cannot repeat this process using O( N) hash functions to ensure that each large coefficient is isolated by one of those functions.

evidence: Since we have good evidence that LWE is a hard problem, this shows that we do not expect to be able to learn significant Fourier coefficients in the random access model.
